---
title: "Research"
toc: true
---

My research spans geospatial data science, statistical modeling, and systems integration. Below are my current and completed projects, each with associated papers or manuscripts where applicable.

## Research Interests ##


## Projects

### Spatial-Temporal Modeling of [Phenomenon]

*[2022 – Present]*

A brief 2–3 sentence description of what this project investigates, the methods used, and the broader significance. Replace this with your own summary.

**Methods:** Bayesian inference (INLA) · Spatial interpolation · R · ArcGIS Pro

**Papers & Manuscripts**

- Chang, G. (2024). *[Paper title]*. Journal of [Name], vol(issue). [DOI](#)
- Chang, G. (2023). *[Manuscript title]*. Working paper.

---

### Machine Learning for [Application Domain]

*[2021 – 2023]*

Brief description of the project — what problem it addresses, what data was used, and what the contribution is.

**Methods:** YOLO · RoboFlow · Python · Remote sensing

**Papers & Manuscripts**

- Chang, G. (2023). *[Paper title]*. Proceedings of [Conference]. [DOI](#)

---

### CRM / ERP Data Integration for [Context]

*[2020 – 2022]*

Brief description of the system built, the integration challenge it addressed, and the outcome.

**Methods:** MySQL · PostgreSQL · Python · ETL pipeline design

**Papers & Manuscripts**

- Chang, G. (2022). *[Paper title]*. [Journal or Conference]. [DOI](#)

---

### [Project Title]

*[Year – Year]*

Brief description.

**Methods:** [tools]

**Papers & Manuscripts**

- Chang, G. ([Year]). *[Paper title]*. [Venue]. [DOI](#)

---

### [Project Title]

*[Year – Year]*

Brief description.

**Methods:** [tools]

---

### [Project Title]

*[Year – Year]*

Brief description.

**Methods:** [tools]

**Papers & Manuscripts**

- Chang, G. ([Year]). *[Paper title]*. [Venue]. [DOI](#)

---

## Standalone Publications

Papers not tied to a specific project above.

- Chang, G. ([Year]). *[Paper title]*. *[Journal Name]*, vol(issue), pp. [DOI](#)
- Chang, G. ([Year]). *[Paper title]*. *[Journal Name]*. [DOI](#)
